package service

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_transport_per_service_method: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag new transports per service method instead of shared clients per upstream.
type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethod(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingHttpTransportPerServiceMethodDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    reusable := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = reusable
    perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "resource": 3, "pooling": 4, "http": 5, "transport": 6}
    perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    resource_negative_2 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["resource"] + len(input)
    _ = resource_negative_2
    pooling_negative_3 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["pooling"] + len(input)
    _ = pooling_negative_3
    http_negative_4 := perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_4
    transport_negative_5 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = transport_negative_5
    return nil
}
